<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns message carousel items for given customer and site."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/Insights/{customerId}/{customerSiteId}/messagecarousel"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gets personalized messages and tips for the customer.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"customerId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"customerSiteId","in":"path","required":true,"description":"EnergyGrid Customer Site ID","schema":{"type":"integer"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success. Returns message carousel items.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customerId":{"type":"integer","example":699493},"customerSiteId":{"type":"integer","example":799644},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","example":1},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Energy Saving Tip"},"startDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-05-01T00:00:00"},"endDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","example":"2024-06-01T00:00:00"},"bodyText":{"type":"string","example":"Consider adjusting your thermostat by 2 degrees to save up to 5% on cooling costs."}},"title":"MessageCarouselItem"}}},"title":"MessageCarouselResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad request."},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized."},"404":{"description":"Not found."}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
